feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to validate at least one digital signature available in PDF file or not
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

 

I am processing some invoices but before processing I have to validate if at least one digital signature available in the same PDF file or not.

I tried to check some solutions here and there but have not found any without API and ADS.

Is there any solution/option to achieve this without using API and ADS?

 

I would appreciate your answer.

 

Regards,

Maneesha

entry.title: Adobe PDF file generated from Spool opening
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

   I have generated the PDF file from spool using the FM, FPCOMP_CREATE_PDF_FROM_SPOOL , but pdf generated is getting stored in the path, 'E:\usr\sap\DEV\SYS\global\SPOOL0000030004_00000.cfg'. This file not getting opened to display the pdf document. Any resolution for this issue ?

Rgds,

G.Khadeer Basha

entry.title: In RAP API unmanaged scenario with draft, Finalized method getting called during patch call
entry.content: Hello all, I am working on RAP API ( OData V4 UI ) unmanaged scenario with draft, so while every patch call ( entering field value ) save sequence methods ( finalize, save..etc ) is getting called. What can be wrong, Is it possible to avoid save sequence methods during patch call?. Thank You

entry.title: Send mail using cl_bcs via SAP distribution list
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to send a mail by using class cl_bcs and a SAP internal distribution list.

That means, I want to create a SAP internal distribution list via SBWP, eg:

Then I want to maintain the mail addresses of recipients in this distribution list.

Then I want to send a mail to this distribution list.

Please do NOT provide any solutions by using deprecated FM SO_NEW_DOCUMENT_SEND_API1!

How could this work? Any got an idea? How can I specifcy / create a recipient object that refers to the distribution list?

BR

entry.title: PO Modification only print the line changed in the pdf embeded in modification email
entry.content:
Hi
We are trying to reove message sending on delivery completed for POs.

We first went to SPRO : Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Fields relevant to printouts of changes and deselect PO column

We then had to come to SPRO and add
Materials Management > Purchasing > Messages > Output Control > Message type > define message type for purchase order > Maintain Message Types for PO
We have set Program to FM06AEND and FORM routine to CHANGE_FLAG.

 

It seems to wok but now when we change a line (material) in the PO, instead of receiving the whole new PO attached as PDF, the PDF only contains the line changed.

Do you know where this could come from ? Or do you know what is the abap program called to generate the PO PDF ?

 

Thanks

entry.title: smartforms text element cannot display
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an existing smartforms and would like to check a text element value. It shows blanks in the text editor. As long as I change the editor setting in RSCPSETEDITOR or i18n, it also the same. How can I see the variable of the text element? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Unable to convert an SAP Script as a PDF and send it via OData (for PDF Viewer Functionality)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Apologies if the question is a bit vague; but I am struggling to achieve; is to convert an existing SAP Script Output to a PDF and then send that PDF via ODATA ( using Media handling ) .

The Output is a PO output designed on SAP Script. So the way I am converting it to a PDF is as follows:

1. Find out the NAST Record for a given Output
2. Using the NAST Record; get the Spool ID.
3. Using FM - RSPO_RETURN_SPOOLJOB get the OTF Data
4. Using FM - CONVERT_OTF_2_PDF converting the ODT to PDF data
5. Then converting the PDF data to XSTRING and then passing that to my get_stream method as below:

Logic for converting SAP Script to PDF:

However when I test the Get_Stream method using /iwfnd/gw_client ; I get the following error:

Please advise where could I be going wrong?

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: Error in direct input(RCPTRA02) LSMW for Routing mass change
entry.content:
Hello all,

I am trying to change already existing routing in LSMW with direct input program RCPTRA02(as per SAP Note 1644841) . But I am getting belwo two errors for activity types & header alternative,

Is there any other way to do mass change in Routing via BAPI ? I am aware of CEWB but this seems complex way to business. We need something like BAPI_ROUTING_CREATE with which we can create custom tool.

Regards,

Akshay

entry.title: A question for CDS view keys
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Assume there is a DB table that has 3 fields, A B and C. A and B are string fields which are also DB keys. C is a GUID fields which is not a DB key.

And then assume I create 2 CDS view on this table: the first one is with key C, and the second one is with key C, A and B.

Which one is better from the performance point of view.

 

Regards,

Ming

entry.title: Use of Secondary Index created on HDB is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB
entry.content:
Dear All,
Index ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI exists in database system HDB, but why my program is throwing an Exception CX_SY_OPEN_SQL_DB ?

Here is my select query:
SELECT *
FROM ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
INTO TABLE lt_ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN
WHERE location = 'BANGALORE'
%_HINTS HDB 'ZEMPLOYEE_MAIN~ZSI'.

What is the mistake I am doing in the Select Query ?
Secondary IndexProgramExceptionThanks in advance.

entry.title: do I need a test double for 'me' method call in method under test?
entry.content:
Hi,
I have a method for which I am writing ABAP Unit test:

 

METHOD do_sth.
"Below method call sets a global attribute value
me->get_facet( ).

"Below method call returns internal table
lt_catlog = me->build_catalog( ).

**other code in method**

ENDMETHOD.

 

do I need to mock the above two method calls as well? how can I achieve this?
I think get_facet( ) and build_catalog( ) calls need mocking. Moreover I have already written test for these two methods individually.

entry.title: How can I prevent the "delete" key from being deleted from the alv?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

When the user presses the "delete" key from the keyboard, they can delete the row in the alv. I want to prevent this. My "Satır Sil" button does this task and should do this with the "Satir Sil" button.




How can I prevent the "delete" key from being deleted from the alv?

Thanks

entry.title: Get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I tried looking on SCN and most of the threads mention table /IWBEP/I_SBD_SV and /IWBEP/I_SBO_ET but I could not find the details. I also tried serching in SEGW using patterns but no luck.

Could you please let me know how can we get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE

Thanks !!

entry.title: How to parse an Employee Central ODATA into ABAP table
entry.content:
I can retrieve a SuccessFactors Employee Central ODATA file, for example ODATA BenefitEnrollment, using an ABAP program.  But I'm unsure about how to parse the data into an internal table with the retrieved data columns and values.  Does someone have an example ABAP program on how to achieve this?

Thanks,

Kenneth

entry.title: ST05 Error "For SQL Statements with an ITAB, the Planviz is not supported"
entry.content:
Hi All,
We wanted to analyze the performance of below select query and we are on S4HANA OP2020 system.

SELECT
a~matnr,
a~bwkey,
a~bwtar,
a~lbkum,
a~salk3,
a~verpr,
a~zkprs,
a~timestamp
FROM mbew AS a
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT matnr, werks FROM @LT_material AS b WHERE matnr = a~matnr ) AND bwkey IN @LT_t001w_rg AND bwtar IN @LT_bwtar
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_mbew_tabn5).

We captured ST05 trace for above SELECT query also and when we are trying to download the plan viz file it gives error like "For SQL Statements with an ITAB, the Planviz is not supported"(PFB screenshot).

It is happening because we are using @LT_material internal table in subquery.We also tried with innerjoin to @LT_material and it give same error.  So how in such cases we can get planviz file? 
Any suggestions?

 



Regards,
Prince

entry.title: how to fetch serial number in vl02n
entry.content:
hi experts.

In VL02N, you can assign a serial number in the extra —> serial number field. If someone writes a new serial number, it’s assigned to that material in that outbound. I want to fetch that and check it. How can I do that? I have tried many ways, but I can’t fetch that specific serial number under the save or PGI button for the first time.

it have to save for the first time then i can fetch it , but i want it before save for the first time.

entry.title: Payment terms returns to 0000 after pressing Enter in FB01
entry.content: I'm having issues in FB01. I tried to enter the payment terms 0101 but after pressing enter, it will return to 0000. How do I debug it?

entry.title: ABAP CDS extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) in not getting delta in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have created a ABAP CDS delta extractor on NSDM_E_MCHBH (replacement of MCHBH) using CDC. SAP recommends to use replacement if available. When the extractor is used in DataSphere Replication flow, the delta load is failing. 

Error - CDS view is Inconsistent and Definition of the view is too complex for automatic CDC

Note - We are getting warning "Definition of view is too complex for automatic CDS" and "Data extraction of CDS entity not possible" in ABAP perspective. We ignored the warning as it was for other extractor's as well and they are fine.

Note , even extractor on MCHBH we faced the same issue.

Please let me know how we can get delta from table MCHBH using ABAP CDS view extractor.

Thanks,

entry.title: show user name in material change log
entry.content:
in mm03, we can see who changed the material (mm03->environment menu->display changes). it's a user id there. How can I display user name in the alv report? what way should I use to enhance?

Thanks

entry.title: Pick value from segments based on qualifier in AIF
entry.content:
Hello,
I have to update index table for AIF.
In my case I have multiple(4 records) values in same segments and it is updating index table with 1st segment only. But I want to pick value for 3rd record (0080293).

I have implemented a note 3416275 and maintained it as below.

Here, I want to update index table with sales organization for qualifier '008' which is at 3rd place.
Could you please guide and help here.
Thanks in advance !
